name: a committed multi-region posture upgrades the balanced default to the most-resilient option
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile v11.json --out req.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-recommend.sh" --requirements req.json --profile v11.json --out opt.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z 2>rr.err; grep -q 'recommended=opt-max' rr.err && echo multiregion-upgraded-pick 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform on AWS with a CI/CD pipeline","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json

bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform on AWS with a CI/CD pipeline" --answers p.json --probe-answer aws:aws_region_strategy=multi-region --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1
